name: @kolm/multimodal-redact-image-worker
description: Isolated kolm multimodal image PII redactor. Detects faces + license plates in raw image bytes and emits a blurred/masked output image. Heavy ML deps (onnxruntime-node, sharp, the YOLO/MediaPipe weights) live HERE — root kolm install stays light. When deps are missing the worker emits an honest install_hint envelope; never silently claims it redacted PII it couldn't see.

models.note: Production face / license-plate detection requires an ONNX model on disk. Default search paths: ~/.kolm/models/yolov8n-face.onnx, ~/.kolm/models/license-plate-detector.onnx. Without a model the worker returns {ok:false, install_hint, redacted_image:null} so the caller knows what's missing.
